title: Warm congratulations to Tianhui Plastics Group for winning the 2020 AAA Customer Medal from Baofeng Energy Group
contentHtml:
On September 24, 2020, Tianhui Plastic Group was invited to participate in Baofeng Energy's 2020 Customer Conference with its annual sales performance. Chairman Zeng Shengwen led the group's outstanding sales team to attend the conference. During the meeting, Zeng Shengwen was invited to address the plenary meeting customers on the group’s current development and future plans. Baofeng Energy highly affirmed our company’s development direction in 2020, and Tianhui PlasticsThe group won the "2020YearDegree AAA customer》medal.

After the meeting, the two parties had an in-depth exchange of views on the current development of the plasticizing industry and reached an agreement on future development and win-win cooperation.Intention to cooperate. 2020 is coming to an end. Tianhui Group’s unyielding, tenacious and courageous spirit inspires every Tianhui person to keep moving forward. Thanks to the upstream strategic partners for their recognition of our group. In the days to come, Tianhui people will certainly live up to their mission and achieve greater success!
titleZh: 热烈祝贺天晖塑料集团荣获宝丰能源集团2020年AAA级客户奖牌
contentHtmlZh:
2020年9月24号，天晖塑料集团以年度销售第一优异业绩受邀参加宝丰能源2020年客户大会，董事长曾胜文率领集团优秀销售团队一同参会。会议期间，曾胜文应邀就集团目前发展及未来规划向全体大会客户致词。宝丰能源就我公司2020年的发展方向给予了高度的肯定，天晖塑料集团以优异的成绩荣获《2020年度AAA级客户》奖牌。

会后，双方就目前塑化行业发展进行了深度交流，并达成未来发展、协作共赢的合作意向。2020年即将接近尾声，天晖集团坚强不屈、顽强拼搏、奋勇前进的精神鼓舞着每一个天晖人不断前进的动力。感谢上游战略伙伴对我集团的肯定，未来的日子，天晖人一定不负使命，再创佳绩！
